description_long: This airplane features a highly stylized, futuristic design with a sleek, black exterior and smooth, flowing contours. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main body, giving it a streamlined, almost organic appearance. The fuselage is thin and tapers to a pointed nose, with minimal visible surface details or panel lines. The cockpit area is subtly indicated by a slightly raised, glossy section near the front, but no clear windows or canopy are visible. The undercarriage is not apparent, suggesting either a retracted or non-traditional landing gear system. Accents of light blue or teal are visible along the lower surfaces, adding a modern, high-tech aesthetic.
description: A sleek, black, futuristic airplane with swept-back wings and smooth, flowing lines, accented by light blue highlights. The design is highly stylized with minimal visible surface details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, streamlined body and sharply swept-back wings with blue accents underneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, narrow fuselage, and integrated wing roots with a subtle cockpit area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the sleek profile and wing configuration, with visible blue highlights on the underside.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tapering fuselage, integrated wing structure, and absence of visible tail or engine details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, blended wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail structure visible; appears to lack vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; undercarriage details are absent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit area with a streamlined, integrated canopy and no visible windows.
